parameters.query: SELECT id, status, gcal_event_id FROM bookings WHERE idempotency_key = $1::text LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ provider_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, service_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.service_id, start_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ provider_id: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, start_time: $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time, lock_duration_minutes: 1 }) }}

parameters.end: ={{ $("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + 60*60000).toISOString() }}
parameters.summary: ={{ `Reserva: Provider ${$("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.provider_id}, Service ${$("Merge Context After Availability").first().json.ctx.service_id}` }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO bookings (provider_id, service_id, start_time, end_time, idempotency_key, gcal_event_id, user_id, status, created_at) VALUES ($1::int, $2::int, $3::timestamp, $4::timestamp, $5::text, $6::text, $7::bigint, 'CONFIRMED', NOW()) RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.provider_id, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.service_id, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.end_time || new Date(new Date($('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.start_time).getTime() + 60*60000).toISOString(), $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.idempotency_key, $('Create GCal Event').first()?.json?.data?.id || null, $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.user_id || $('Generate Idempotency Key').first().json.ctx.chat_id] }}
